Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Ime Of Plaintiff And For Sanctions
Off Calendar Dec-10-2015 Denied
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES: Atty. MICHAEL J. HANLEY, ESQ. of Law Offices of Michael J. Hanley, Tel No. 415-441-1112 appearing for the Plaintiff;
Atty. LINCOLN TRAN, ESQ. of McNamara, Ney, Beatty, Slattery, Borges & Ambacher, LLP, Tel No. 707-427-3998 appearing telephonically for Defendant Naomi Miller.

The Court's tentaitve ruling instructed parties to appear at hearing. Both sides stipulate to matter being heard by the pro tem judge. Matter argued and submitted by counsel. The Court orders as follows: DEFENDANT NAOMI MILLER'S Motion To Compel IME Of Plaintiff And For Sanctions is DENIED. Plaintiff shall prepare and submit a proposed order to the Court for signature in compliance with CRC 3.1312. Judge Pro Tem: Dennis Hyde, Clerk: Sean Kane, Not Reported. (302/JPT)
